prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Structural framing, part of the Carpentry & Finishes scope. The observed field condition is: notching/boring beyond IRC limits (notch depth vs. joist depth - measurable in photo). The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: IRC R502, R602. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: Measurement check: Structural framing (commercial project)
